sentences.arabic: جَاءَتْ ضَيْفَةٌ جَدِيدَةٌ إِلَى الصَّفِّ اسْمُهَا رِيمٌ.
sentences.translation: U razred je stigla nova gošća, njena je Rim.
sentences.translationEn: A new guest came to the class named Reem.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ خَجُولَةً وَلَمْ تَتَكَلَّمْ فِي الْبِدَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bila je stidljiva i u početku nije govorila.
sentences.translationEn: She was shy and did not speak at first.

sentences.arabic: اقْتَرَبَتْ مِنْهَا إِحْدَى الْبَنَاتِ وَعَرَّفَتْهَا بِنَفْسِهَا.
sentences.translation: Jedna djevojčica je prišla i predstavila joj se.
sentences.translationEn: One of the girls approached her and introduced herself.

sentences.translation: Rim se nasmiješila i počela govoriti i smijati.
sentences.translationEn: Reem smiled and began to talk and laugh.
